description: PostgreSQL MCP server for schema, query, health, security, and performance analysis.
name: io.github.snss10/dbeast

environmentVariables.description: PostgreSQL host when DATABASE_URL is not used.
environmentVariables.name: DB_HOST

environmentVariables.description: PostgreSQL port when DATABASE_URL is not used.
environmentVariables.name: DB_PORT

environmentVariables.description: PostgreSQL user when DATABASE_URL is not used.
environmentVariables.name: DB_USER

environmentVariables.description: PostgreSQL password when DATABASE_URL is not used.
environmentVariables.name: DB_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: PostgreSQL database name when DATABASE_URL is not used.
environmentVariables.name: DB_NAME

environmentVariables.description: AWS Secrets Manager secret containing PostgreSQL credentials.
environmentVariables.name: AWS_SECRET_NAME

environmentVariables.description: AWS region for Secrets Manager lookup.
environmentVariables.name: AWS_REGION

title: DBeast PostgreSQL MCP
